purpose: Prove IAMScope can emit blocked admin reachability when an IAM-allowed AssumeRole admin path is governed by a complete SCP Deny while collection-role access is preserved by a supported principal carveout.
claim_surface: IAMScope can collect live Organizations SCP evidence while a broad sts:AssumeRole SCP is attached to the member account.
IAMScope can bind a complete SCP deny on sts:AssumeRole to the relevant AssumeRole trust edge.
IAMScope can emit blocked admin_reachability for the Env13 alice->admin path without validating it.
benchmark_proves: For Env13, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole permission edge from alice to admin.
For Env13, scenario.json contains the expected sts:AssumeRole trust edge from alice to admin.
Scenario.json contains an SCP constraint denying sts:AssumeRole.
The Env13 target trust edge is bound to an SCP constraint.
For the same source and target, IAMScope emits at least one blocked admin_reachability finding with SCP blocker evidence.
For the same source and target, IAMScope emits zero validated admin_reachability findings.
benchmark_does_not_prove: It does not prove NotAction SCP handling live.
It does not prove resource-scoped SCP precise blocking; Env12 covers that as partial/inconclusive.
It does not prove every aws:PrincipalArn carveout shape.
It does not prove root or OU inherited SCP behavior beyond the selected direct member-account attachment.
It does not prove broad Organizations safety outside the dedicated test account.
unknowns_remaining: Whether other SCP condition and exception forms produce the intended truth states remains outside this case.
Whether multi-account cross-account AssumeRole paths interact with SCPs the same way remains outside this case.
Whether the management caller PrincipalArn carveout works for every credential sourcing shape remains outside this case.

environment.notes: Existing management account and existing dedicated member account. Terraform creates only member IAM fixture; run.sh creates one Env13-specific SCP with Resource * and a PrincipalArn carveout for collection, then attaches it directly to the member account.

ground_truth.reason: Alice has IAM permission and trust to assume env13-admin, and env13-admin is admin-equivalent, but the attached Env13 SCP denies sts:AssumeRole with Resource * for non-excepted principals.

directly_proven_if_pass: The exact Env13 alice->admin permission edge exists structurally.
The exact Env13 alice->admin trust edge exists structurally.
A live Organizations SCP denying sts:AssumeRole with wildcard Resource is present in scenario.json.
The Env13 trust edge is bound to an SCP constraint.
The exact Env13 alice->admin path is emitted as blocked admin reachability with SCP blocker evidence.
The exact Env13 alice->admin path is not falsely emitted as validated admin reachability.
strongly_supported_if_pass: IAMScope can distinguish partial/resource-scoped SCP evidence from complete wildcard-resource SCP blocking in this benchmark family.
only_implied_even_if_pass: Broader SCP family correctness remains only implied.
